reason: Bug-level colour fix requested directly by the author: a tile's emoji TextBlock had no Foreground, so text-presentation emoji (hearts, checks) rendered in the default black and disappeared on dark tiles. The emoji now takes the tile's own colour when one is set and the theme's in-tile text colour otherwise; full-colour emoji are unaffected. No layout, sizing or new controls — one Foreground assignment in MakeBubble reusing the existing ParseTileColor value, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
